# Button Group

Groups related buttons together with consistent borders and spacing.

## Installation

Add the Button Group component from the configured StackTrace registry.

```shell
npx shadcn-vue@latest add @stacktrace/button-group
```

## Usage

Use `ButtonGroup` when adjacent actions operate on the same object or form one compact control. Keep unrelated actions separate; joined borders imply a relationship and should not be used merely to save space.

```vue
<template>
  <ButtonGroup aria-label="Document actions">
    <Button variant="outline">
      Save
    </Button>
    <Button variant="outline">
      Publish
    </Button>
    <Button variant="outline" size="icon" aria-label="More actions">
      <EllipsisIcon />
    </Button>
  </ButtonGroup>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { EllipsisIcon } from '@lucide/vue'
import { Button } from '@/Components/Button'
import { ButtonGroup } from '@/Components/ButtonGroup'
</script>
```

## Orientation and sizing

Groups are horizontal by default. Set `orientation="vertical"` when the actions need to stack, and use the same orientation on nested separators. Button size remains an individual `Button` concern; keep buttons in one group the same size unless a split action intentionally uses a compact icon control.

## Supporting content

`ButtonGroupSeparator` can divide filled or split controls; outline buttons already provide their own boundary and usually do not need one. Use `ButtonGroupText` for a short, non-interactive prefix or suffix. It accepts `as` and `as-child`; preserve appropriate semantics when composing it with another element. See the [composition fundamentals](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/fundamentals/composition).

## Accessibility

Button Group renders with `role="group"`. Add `aria-label` or `aria-labelledby` when surrounding text does not already name the group. Keyboard focus still moves to each button with Tab; the group does not turn independent actions into a single arrow-key control.

> **Use Toggle Group for a shared selection: [Toggle Group](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/toggle-group)**
>
> Choose Toggle Group when the controls select one or more persistent states. Button Group is for actions that run when activated.

Hosted documentation: [Button Group](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/button-group)
